creator: info@babaei.net
text:
Thank you so much for the explanation. Well, by crash I mean segfaults during the previous invocations of make. The log I posted was from the last make command.

By the way, thanks for the suggestion. MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes did it. I am now sure this is RAM-related issue as I used to build GCC many times on this machine using UFS filesystem. As I said the only change was UFS to ZFS migration. It seems I need more memory now.

Again thank you so much for your help.
